Your Trusted Plumbers in Malta

In need of a qualified plumber for your Malta home or business? Let Plumbers 911 help. Call 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to find a plumber today.

Homes with large lots and plenty of green space like Izaak Walton Park attract families to Prospect Heights, and business owners thrive with locations along Rand Road and Palantine Road. Even with the perks, Prospect Heights still has its share of plumbing issues. Plumbers 911 makes the search for a Prospect Heights plumber easier when your home or business needs plumbing repairs. 

We connect you to the best plumbing contractors  in Prospect Heights. They work right in your neighborhood and are prepared with the right tools and equipment to put their expertise to work. Contact Plumbers 911 today no matter what type of plumbing issue you're having.

Why Hire Our Malta Plumbers?

As soon as you notice a problem with your plumbing, you know you need a plumber fast. Deciding on one can be overwhelming. Google searches turn up plenty of company names, but they don't tell you how reliable the plumbers are or which ones have the proper tools and insurance.


Plumbers 911 solves that problem with our fully researched network that helps you find a qualified plumber in Prospect Heights. We find the best local companies with the experience you want in a plumber. When you call us, you get instantly connected to the right local plumber for the job.

Prescreened, Highly Qualified Malta Plumbers

With Plumbers 911, you get a local Prospect Heights plumbing contractor that's committed to the community. We verify that each plumber is licensed, insured and bonded before adding them to our network.


Our team looks at how much experience each plumber has, choosing only plumbers with thousands of hours of work experience. Our plumbers complete an intense training process to ensure they're current on the latest plumbing technology, tools and equipment. 

Our plumbers must also pass our drug test process. Our comprehensive screening process leaves you with only the very best, highly trained plumbers.

Malta Plumbing Services Overview

Every Prospect Heights plumber in our network can handle all types of plumbing issues, no matter what problem you're facing. They're quick and efficient, so you can get back to life and business as usual. Here are a few of the services our plumbers offer:


Emergency Services: When an unexpected plumbing issue happens, you want a competent plumber handling the repairs. You also want a plumber in Prospect Heights who can get to you quickly. We can connect you to speedy emergency plumbing services to fix the problem even outside of normal business hours.


Drain Cleaning: Clogged drains slow down water and can keep you from using your sinks or showers. With professional Prospect Heights plumbing services, you can get your pipes flowing again. Specialty drain cleaning tools allow a licensed plumber to clean out the insides of your pipes efficiently and safely.


Water Heater Repair: Your water heater is one of those things that doesn't seem like a big deal until it stops working. Businesses often rely on hot water for sanitation, and at home, you need hot water to take comfortable showers, clean dishes and handle other tasks. When your water heater isn't producing hot water like usual, a licensed plumber can identify and fix the problem.


Sump Pump Repair: Summer rains and melting snow make a sump pump a lifesaver when it comes to keeping your Prospect Heights home dry. If yours stops working, you need fast repairs to keep your basement dry and protected. A quick call to Plumbers 911 connects you to a local plumber who can repair your sump pump.

This quick overview gives you an idea of what our plumbers handle on a regular basis. Find even more plumbing service options in the extensive list below.
